screens.name: Provider Dashboard
screens.description: Provider home with stats, AI chat assistant, and active patient list

sections.title: AI Assistant
sections.description: Full-height streaming chat interface. Sends prompts to Claude Service (sonnet model). Pre-seeded greeting. Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline.

sections.title: Active Patients
sections.description: 3 mock patients (John D. active, Maria S. pending, Alex K. completed). Each links to /doctors/consultation/{id}

actions.label: Kosyn
actions.description: App logo with Shield icon — navigates to home page

actions.label: Dashboard
actions.description: Centered nav link to provider dashboard

actions.label: Register
actions.description: Centered nav link to provider registration

actions.label: Connect Wallet
actions.description: Opens Thirdweb Connect wallet modal — MetaMask for providers
KUSD balance fetched from KosynUSD contract via useReadContract — updates on wallet connect and after transactions

actions.label: KUSD
actions.description: Token label next to balance — part of the KusdBadge component in nav header

actions.label: Deposit
actions.description: Opens deposit modal — fund wallet with KUSD. Dashed emerald border, Plus icon

actions.label: Sepolia
actions.description: Network badge — shows current chain name from wallet connection. Blue dot indicator

actions.label: 0x7458...5B78
actions.description: Thirdweb ConnectButton detailsButton — opens wallet details panel for address, network switch, disconnect

actions.label: View Records
actions.description: Navigate to patient consultation — each patient row links to /doctors/consultation/{consultationId}

states.name: Connected
states.description: Provider signed in — stats, AI chat, and patient list visible. AuthGate bypassed in dev-preview mode.

elementDescriptions.Kosyn: App logo text in nav header — links to home page ('/'). Preceded by Shield icon. Always visible.
elementDescriptions.Dashboard: Centered nav link to /doctors/dashboard — highlighted as current page with text-foreground and font-medium.
elementDescriptions.Register: Centered nav link to /doctors/onboarding — navigates to provider registration form. Muted text when not active.
elementDescriptions.0.00: KUSD balance in KusdBadge component — formatted from KosynUSD.balanceOf(address) / 1e18 via useReadContract. Green text (text-emerald-400). Shows '0.00' when balance is zero.
elementDescriptions.KUSD: Token label inside KusdBadge — identifies the token as KosynUSD. Muted foreground text, next to the numeric balance.
elementDescriptions.Deposit: Button in nav header — opens DepositModal overlay for buying KUSD. Dashed emerald border (border-dashed border-emerald-500/40), Plus icon, only rendered when account is connected.
elementDescriptions.Sepolia: Network badge in nav header via NetworkBadge component — chain name from useActiveWalletChain().id mapped via CHAIN_META lookup. Blue dot indicator (bg-blue-500). Only rendered when account and chain are available.
elementDescriptions.0x7458...5B78: Truncated wallet address button in nav header — rendered by Thirdweb ConnectButton detailsButton. Opens wallet details panel on click.
elementDescriptions.Provider Dashboard: Page heading (h1) — centered text-2xl font-bold. Identifies the current page as the provider dashboard.
elementDescriptions.AI-assisted clinical intelligence. All d: Subtitle under page heading — centered text-sm text-muted-foreground. Communicates that AI runs inside CRE TEE enclaves.
elementDescriptions.12: Total Patients stat value — mock count of all registered patients. Bold 2xl text in stat card with Users icon (text-blue-400).
elementDescriptions.Total Patients: Stat card label below '12' value — text-xs text-muted-foreground. Identifies the total patients metric.
elementDescriptions.3: Today stat value — appointments scheduled for today. Bold 2xl text in stat card with Stethoscope icon (text-purple-400).
elementDescriptions.Today: Stat card label below '3' value — text-xs text-muted-foreground. Identifies today's appointment count.
elementDescriptions.1: In Queue stat value — patients waiting for consultation. Bold 2xl text in stat card with Clock icon (text-amber-400).
elementDescriptions.In Queue: Stat card label below '1' value — text-xs text-muted-foreground. Identifies the current queue depth.
elementDescriptions.$450: KUSD Earned stat value — total consultation revenue. Bold 2xl text in stat card with Activity icon (text-emerald-400).
elementDescriptions.KUSD Earned: Stat card label below '$450' value — text-xs text-muted-foreground. Identifies lifetime provider earnings.
elementDescriptions.AI Clinical Assistant: Card title for AI chat section — text-lg with Bot icon. Rendered by AiChat component in lg:col-span-2 (2/3 width).
elementDescriptions.Hello, I'm your AI clinical assistant. I: Pre-seeded assistant greeting message — shown on initial load in AI chat. Displayed in bg-muted bubble with Bot avatar. Explains capabilities (SOAP notes, coding, interactions, docs).
elementDescriptions.Ask about SOAP notes, medical codes, dru: Textarea placeholder in AI chat input — guides provider on what to ask. Min-height 40px, Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline.
elementDescriptions.Active Patients: Card title for patient list sidebar (1/3 width) — text-sm in CardHeader. Lists patients with status badges.
Patient name — from mockPatients array. Links to /doctors/consultation/1. Text-sm in a bordered row with hover:bg-muted/50.
elementDescriptions.active: Status badge for John D. — green variant (bg-green-500/10, text-green-400, border-green-500/20). Indicates ongoing consultation.
Patient name — from mockPatients array. Links to /doctors/consultation/2. Text-sm in a bordered row.
elementDescriptions.pending: Status badge for Maria S. — amber variant (bg-amber-500/10, text-amber-400, border-amber-500/20). Indicates awaiting consultation start.
Patient name — from mockPatients array. Links to /doctors/consultation/3. Text-sm in a bordered row.
elementDescriptions.completed: Status badge for Alex K. — muted variant (bg-muted, text-muted-foreground). Indicates consultation finished.

steps.description: Provider types question in AiChat textarea
chat({ prompt, model: 'sonnet' }) streams POST to Claude Service /chat
Tokens stream into assistant message bubble. Falls back to demo on error.

sections.description: CRE workflow steps feed for provider-registration workflow

states.name: Connected
states.description: Provider signed in — full registration form, CRE workflow feed, and submit button visible. AuthGate bypassed in dev-preview mode.

elementDescriptions.Kosyn: App logo text in nav header — links to home page ('/'). Preceded by Shield icon. Always visible.
elementDescriptions.Dashboard: Centered nav link to /doctors/dashboard — navigates to provider dashboard. Muted text when not active.
elementDescriptions.Register: Centered nav link to /doctors/onboarding — highlighted as current page with text-foreground and font-medium.
elementDescriptions.0.00: KUSD balance in KusdBadge component — formatted from KosynUSD.balanceOf(address) / 1e18 via useReadContract. Green text (text-emerald-400). Shows '0.00' when balance is zero.
elementDescriptions.KUSD: Token label inside KusdBadge — identifies the token as KosynUSD. Muted foreground text, next to the numeric balance.
elementDescriptions.Deposit: Button in nav header — opens DepositModal overlay for buying KUSD. Dashed emerald border (border-dashed border-emerald-500/40), Plus icon, only rendered when account is connected.
elementDescriptions.Sepolia: Network badge in nav header via NetworkBadge component — chain name from useActiveWalletChain().id mapped via CHAIN_META lookup. Blue dot indicator (bg-blue-500). Only rendered when account and chain are available.
elementDescriptions.0x7458...5B78: Truncated wallet address button in nav header — rendered by Thirdweb ConnectButton detailsButton. Opens wallet details panel on click.
elementDescriptions.Provider Registration: Page heading (h1) — centered text-2xl font-bold. Also appears as card title (text-lg) inside ProviderRegister component with ShieldCheck icon.
elementDescriptions.Register as a healthcare provider. Your: Subtitle under page heading — centered text-sm text-muted-foreground. Explains TEE enclave verification for certificate privacy.
elementDescriptions.Full Name: Form field label — required text input for provider's full name. Placeholder: 'Dr. Jane Smith'. Inside 2-column grid.
elementDescriptions.Specialty: Form field label — required select dropdown for medical specialty. Options: Internal Medicine, Cardiology, Dermatology, Neurology, Pediatrics, Psychiatry, Orthopedics, Oncology.
elementDescriptions.Select specialty: Placeholder text inside Specialty select dropdown — shown via SelectValue when no specialty is selected yet.
elementDescriptions.Jurisdiction: Form field label — required text input for licensing jurisdiction. Placeholder: 'US-CA'. Identifies the state/country of licensure.
elementDescriptions.License Number: Form field label — required text input for medical license number. Placeholder: 'A-123456'. Used for CRE TEE verification.
elementDescriptions.Consultation Fee (KUSD): Form field label — required number input for provider's per-consultation fee. Placeholder: '50'. Amount in KUSD tokens.
elementDescriptions.Medical Certificate: Form field label — optional file input for certificate upload. Accepts .pdf, .jpg, .png. Selected file name shown below in text-xs text-muted-foreground.
elementDescriptions.Your certificate will be verified inside: Privacy notice inside rounded bg-muted/50 info box — text-xs text-muted-foreground. Explains CRE TEE confidentiality guarantee.
elementDescriptions.Register as Provider: Submit button text — full-width Button with Upload icon. Triggers triggerWorkflow('provider-registration', formData) via POST /api/cre/provider-registration. Shows 'Submitting...' while isSubmitting is true.
elementDescriptions.CRE Workflow: Card title for CRE workflow feed sidebar (1/3 width) — text-sm with Cpu icon (text-primary). Rendered by CreFeed component with workflow='provider-registration'.
elementDescriptions.Verifying certificate: CRE workflow step 1 — label from getWorkflowSteps('provider-registration')[0]. TEE verifies uploaded medical certificate. Status icon transitions: Clock (pending) -> Loader2 spinning (processing) -> CheckCircle2 (done).
elementDescriptions.Registering on-chain: CRE workflow step 2 — label from getWorkflowSteps('provider-registration')[1]. Writes verified provider to ProviderRegistry contract. Status icon transitions: Clock (pending) -> Loader2 spinning (processing) -> CheckCircle2 (done).

steps.description: Provider fills all required fields in form
CRE TEE verifies license hash, registers provider on-chain (opcode 0x03)
CreFeed animates steps, toast shows success/error

screens.name: Active Patients (inline)
screens.description: Inline patient list on provider dashboard — not a separate page
